title: AP State BDS — Bid Data Sheet Instantiation Pattern
text_english: BDS (Bid Data Sheet) — single-source instantiation table for AP State works tenders. ITB 1.1: Reference number of the Request for Bids: {{rfb_reference}}. ITB 1.1: The Authority is: {{authority_name}}. ITB 1.1: Name of the work: {{work_title}}. ITB 1.2(a) — Electronic Procurement System: The Authority SHALL USE the AP State e-Procurement portal at {{eproc_portal_url}} (default https://www.apeprocurement.gov.in) for: (i) Technical Proposal upload; (ii) Financial Proposal — Priced Bid uploaded through the web-portal ONLY. ITB 4.1: Maximum number of members in JV = {{max_jv_members}}. ITB 21.2: In addition to the original Bid, number of copies = {{num_copies}}. ITB 22.1: For Bid submission purposes only, the Authority's address is {{submission_address}}; submission date {{submission_date}} time {{submission_time}}. Bid submission stages: Stage I (Eligibility + Technical), Stage II (Financial).

parameters.name: authority_name
parameters.label: Authority Name
parameters.example: Greater Visakhapatnam Smart City Corporation Limited

parameters.name: work_title
parameters.label: Work Title
parameters.example: Sewerage Package 2 balance works (phase-I, Gajuwaka area) — UGSS

parameters.name: num_copies
parameters.label: Number of Bid Copies (in addition to original)

parameters.name: submission_address
parameters.label: Submission Address
parameters.example: MD&CEO, GVSCCL, Plot 21, Kirlampudi Layout, Beach Road, Visakhapatnam 530017
